ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "jira" TEXT /* JIRA identifier for the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Descriptive summary of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporter who created the issue */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor(s) assigned to the issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved, Closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Expected resolution date */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue (e.g., Fixed, Won't Fix, Duplicate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated labels for categorization */,
  "parent_issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent issue (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_parent_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., Developer, Tester, Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the contributor belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the contributor was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_components" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_contributors" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the contributor was assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "contributor_id")
)
column_names: Priority level of the issue (e.g., Major, Minor)
ID of the reporter who created the issue
ID of the contributor(s) assigned to the issue
ID of the project the issue belongs to
Current status of the issue (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved, Closed)

ID of the parent issue (for hierarchical relationships)
ID of the project the component belongs to
